experiences.title: Software Engineer
description: Engineered and maintained RESTful APIs for applications, CRM websites, and charging station networks using Ruby on Rails (ROR), optimizing data handling for scalability and efficiency by 60%.
Optimized SQL and NoSQL databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB) by implementing indexing & query optimization, reducing retrieval time by 74%.

Collaborated with cross-functional teams, including front-end developers and UI/UX designers, to integrate back-end services with front-end applications, ensuring seamless data flow and reducing integration issues by 25%.
Implemented Redis-based caching strategies to collaborate efficiently with front-end teams, reducing API response times by 40% and enhancing system performance for e-vehicle work.
Effectively communicated complex debugging solutions while troubleshooting and upgrading software, leading to an 80% system performance optimization.
Created and maintained comprehensive documentation and unit test cases using RSpec, reducing post-release defects by nearly 70% and improving knowledge sharing within the development team.

experiences.title: Web Developer Intern
description: Developed front-end UI using HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, and JavaScript, reducing page load time by 30% and enhancing responsiveness.
Assembled SPAs using jQuery and AJAX, improving user interaction speed by 40% through content updates without full-page reloads.
Customized the back-end using PHP and MySQL to meet client-specific requirements, collaborating with the development team to reduce project turnaround time by 30%.

education.degree: Post Graduate Certificate in Full Stack Software Development

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology

projects.name: Farm Fresh
projects.description: Built an e-commerce platform (Farm Fresh) with cart and checkout functionality. Integrated session management using cookies and optimized JSON-based product loading, reducing response time by 30% and leading to a smoother user experience.

projects.name: Travel Mate
projects.description: Designed a travel website (Travel Mate) featuring hotel booking, user reviews, and travel packages, improving accessibility and ease of trip planning.

projects.name: Helperland
projects.description: Worked on a home cleaning service platform with appointment booking using AJAX for real-time back-end data processing. Reduced booking errors by 80% through form validation and real-time availability checks.

projects.name: Easymeds
projects.description: Created a healthcare platform that provided information on medicine, expert consultations, and appointment bookings, integrating Google Forms for feedback to enhance patient convenience and user experience.
